name: Phishing Response Orchestrator
description: Guides analysts through phishing incident response: email analysis, tenant-wide search, purge, sender block, and affected user remediation — with approval gates at every write operation.

conversation_starters.text: I have a reported phishing email — Message ID AAMkAD... Analyze it.
Purge all copies of phishing email with subject 'Your invoice is ready'
Did any users who received today's phishing campaign show signs of compromise?
